log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Kobold — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 8 falling damage. HP: 170/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 16] FAIL — still paralyzed.
=== ROUND 2 ===

=== ROUND 4 ===

→ Kobold — Unarmored Caster loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 7 vs DC 10]
Young Red Dragon attacks Kobold — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 15] HIT! 15 damage. Kobold — Unarmored Caster HP: 34/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Kobold — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 15] HIT! 20 damage. Kobold — Unarmored Caster HP: 14/67
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Kobold — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Kobold — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Kobold — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 15] HIT! 13 damage. Kobold — Unarmored Caster HP: 1/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Kobold — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 15] HIT! 20 damage. Kobold — Unarmored Caster HP: 0/67
